analysis.summary: The All-In podcast discusses their 2026 predictions, covering various topics such as the California exodus, biggest political and business winners and losers, and anticipated trends. They also share their most contrarian beliefs and predictions for best and worst performing assets. The hosts provide their insights and opinions on the current state of the economy and technology.

takeaways.text: California exodus may continue due to asset seizure tax
Besties predict a big year for Austin
Biggest business winner may be a company that adapts to AI
Biggest business loser may be a company that fails to adapt to AI
Most anticipated trend is the growth of AI
Most contrarian belief is that AI will not replace human workers
Best performing asset may be a tech stock
Worst performing asset may be a traditional industry stock

sentiment.notes: The hosts seem excited about the potential of AI and its impact on the economy, but also cautious about the potential risks and challenges.

notable_moments.description: Introduction to the podcast and discussion of the California exodus
Discussion of the most contrarian belief about AI
